content.text:
All 5 packages pass type checking now. Here's a summary of the fixes:

1. **`packages/ch-schema/src/generated/chkit-ingest.ts`** — Changed `Ingestor.insert` parameter from `Record<string, unknown>[]` to `object[]` (generated row interfaces lack index signatures)
2. **`apps/api/src/clickhouse.ts`** — Matched `ClickHouseExecutor.insert` to use `object[]` instead of `<T extends Record<string, unknown>>`
3. **`apps/api/src/__tests__/ingest.test.ts`** — Removed explicit `Record<string, unknown>` type annotation on `.map()` callback
4. **`apps/api/src/services/overview.service.ts`** — Added `topPerformer[0]` truthiness check to narrow away `undefined`
5. **`apps/api/src/services/session-analytics.service.ts`** — Used double cast (`as unknown as Record<string, unknown>`) for the index access
6. **`apps/web/src/components/charts/TaskClassificationChart.tsx`** — Defined `TaskClassification` locally since it doesn't exist in `@rudel/api-routes`
